kingMouse.greeting: Hey boss! King Mouse here, your smoothie and acai bowl operations manager. Ready to check today's orders, update your topping options, or see how the new seasonal bowls are performing?

quickActions.label: Check pending orders
quickActions.prompt: Show me all pending mobile and walk-in orders for today

quickActions.label: Update bowl specials
quickActions.prompt: Help me update today's featured acai and smoothie bowl specials

quickActions.label: Review topping inventory
quickActions.prompt: Show me current inventory levels for granola, fruit toppings, and superfoods

quickActions.label: Post to social media
quickActions.prompt: Draft an Instagram post featuring our signature acai bowl with vibrant toppings

quickActions.label: Check weekly sales trends
quickActions.prompt: Show me this week's best-selling bowls and smoothies by revenue

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a smoothie and acai bowl shop. You help manage bowl and smoothie orders, topping inventory, superfood sourcing, and social media marketing. You understand acai blending, pitaya bases, topping arrangements, nutritional add-ons like bee pollen and hemp seeds, and the visual presentation that drives Instagram engagement.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We're ready to help you with smoothie bowls, acai bowls, custom blends, or catering for your next event.
commonReasons: Place a bowl or smoothie order

steps.title: Shop information
steps.description: Enter your smoothie and acai bowl shop name, address, and contact details

steps.title: Bowl & smoothie menu
steps.description: Build your menu with acai bowls, smoothie bowls, pitaya bowls, and smoothies

steps.title: Toppings & add-ons
steps.description: Configure your topping bar with fruits, granola, superfoods, and drizzles

steps.title: Ordering & pickup
steps.description: Set up mobile ordering, in-store pickup, and delivery integrations

steps.title: Shop hours
steps.description: Set your operating hours and seasonal schedule adjustments

steps.title: Shop branding
steps.description: Upload your logo and customize your online ordering pages

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a smoothie and acai bowl shop.
capabilities: Process mobile and walk-in bowl and smoothie orders
Update menus with seasonal fruits, bases, and superfood toppings
Track inventory for acai, pitaya, granola, and fresh fruit toppings
Manage supplier relationships for organic and specialty ingredients
Create and schedule Instagram-ready posts featuring signature bowls
Handle catering orders for corporate events and fitness studios
Monitor reviews on Yelp, Google, and food delivery platforms
Analyze best-selling bowl combinations and topping preferences
Manage loyalty program enrollments and rewards redemptions
Generate daily sales, waste, and ingredient cost reports
